generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic modeling",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryInsight
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validates trajectory execution through simulation",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResult
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements against simulations for validation",
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlert
]
instance PythonLoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python application for logging sensor data to TimescaleDB via MQTT",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]
instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds",
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]
instance HMIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides human-machine interface for operator control and configuration",
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlAction
]
instance TrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory path generated for container movement"
]
instance SimulationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results showing trajectory execution validity"
]
instance ValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts operators of deviations requiring maintenance or adjustment"
]
instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of trajectory traces with confidence bounds"
]
instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data visualization for trend analysis"
]
instance OperatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator commands for crane movement and configuration",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance MaintenanceDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Maintenance action required due to deviation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance AdjustmentDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment to trajectory parameters required due to deviation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing sensor data and validation metrics",
    DTDFVocab:enables PythonLoggingApplication
]
instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for dashboard display",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission between physical and virtual components",
    DTDFVocab:enables PythonLoggingApplication
]
instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying database, MQTT broker, and dashboard services",
    DTDFVocab:enables PythonLoggingApplication, VisualizationDashboardService
]
instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for controlling gantry crane hardware components",
    DTDFVocab:enables HMIService
]
instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for monitoring and controlling physical sensors and actuators"
]
instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling tool for digital twin design"
]
instance KiCadEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design tool for custom shield design"
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionSensor
]
instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionSensor
]
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion for lab-scale gantry crane system",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for lab-scale gantry crane system",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance CartPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures cart position along gantry rail",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance HoistPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist vertical position",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements from encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]
instance CartPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time cart position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]
instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time hoist vertical position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]
instance TimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data including sensor readings, motor positions, and validation metrics",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, CartPositionDataTransmitted, HoistPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane system created in Autodesk Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo C4ModelEnabler
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for optimal trajectory generation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]
instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for trajectory execution validation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]
instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for cart movement"
]
instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controller for hoist movement"
]
instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]
instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]
instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling"
]
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Interface for physical crane control and monitoring"
]
instance LabGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartPositionSensor, HoistPositionSensor, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, PhysicalCraneInterface, PythonLoggingApplication, TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, DockerEnabler, PythonGantrylibModule, Arduino, C4ModelEnabler, KiCadEnabler, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, VisualizationDashboardService, HMIService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are sent to the Control Application, which interfaces with the physical crane's motor controllers (TMC4671-Eval) to execute movements via the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation occurring at the operational speed of the physical crane; no specific time intervals specified beyond 'continuous' monitoring as described in the continuous validation service."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical components (crane hardware, interface, control, logging, HMI) with digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation, MQTT) connected via MQTT messaging and TimescaleDB data storage, forming a unified system architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and 'as operated' (real-time data logging, validation, and control during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between simulated and measured trajectory data; threshold-based breach detection triggers notifications for operator intervention, as validated in publications [5] and [6]."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Python-based Physical Crane Interface for controller communication; TimescaleDB for persistent data storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a single personal computer using Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip for application logic."
]
